ClientSettings.ApplicationTitle: Change Account Password | Self-Service Account Management Tools

ChangePasswordForm.HelpText: If you are having trouble with this tool, please contact IT Support

ErrorsPasswordForm.UsernameEmailPattern: Please enter a valid email address

Alerts.SuccessAlertTitle: You have changed your password successfully.
Alerts.SuccessAlertBody: Please note it may take a few hours for your new password to reach all domain controllers.
Alerts.ErrorPasswordChangeNotAllowed: You are not allowed to change your password. Please contact your system administrator.
Alerts.ErrorInvalidCredentials: You need to provide the correct current password.
Alerts.ErrorInvalidDomain: You have supplied an invalid domain to logon to.
Alerts.ErrorInvalidUser: We could not find your user account.
Alerts.ErrorCaptcha: Could not verify you are not a robot.
Alerts.ErrorComplexPassword: Failed due to password complexity policies: New password length is shorter than AD minimum password length
Alerts.ErrorConnectionLdap: Unhandled error connecting to the LDAP server.
Alerts.ErrorScorePassword: The password you are trying to set is not secure enough.
Alerts.ErrorDistancePassword: The password you are trying to set is not different enough from your last password.
Alerts.ErrorPwnedPassword: The password you are trying to use is publicly known and can be used in dictionary attacks.
